raw.value:
{"title":"Sample OpenAPI (Sandbox)","code":"openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Petstore API
  description: A sample API for a pet store
  version: 1.0.0
servers:
  - url: https://api.petstore.example.com/v1
paths:
  /pets:
    get:
      summary: List all pets
      operationId: listPets
      parameters:
        - name: limit
          in: query
          required: false
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        '200':
          description: A list of pets
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/Pet'
components:
  schemas:
    Pet:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        name:
          type: string
        tag:
          type: string","styles":"","mermaidCode":"","diagramType":"OpenAPI","source":"CustomContent"}
